task_completion.description: Create a new accrual plan named 'Monthly PTO Accrual'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an Accrual Plan form or list view with the name 'Monthly PTO Accrual'.

task_completion.description: Configure the plan to accrue 1.67 days monthly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Accrual Plan rules section, the rate is set to '1.67' days and the frequency/step is set to 'Monthly' or 'Months'.

task_completion.description: Configure a maximum cap of 20 days for the accrual plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Accrual Plan rules section, the maximum cap or limit is explicitly enabled and set to '20' days.

task_completion.description: Create an Accrual Allocation for Paid Time Off
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a Time Off Allocation form with the Allocation Type set to 'Accrual Allocation' and the Time Off Type set to 'Paid Time Off'.

task_completion.description: Assign the allocation to employee Eli Lambert using the new accrual plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Allocation form shows 'Eli Lambert' in the Employee field and 'Monthly PTO Accrual' selected in the Accrual Plan field.
The Allocation record shows a status of 'Approved' or 'Validated' (typically a green status indicator or the 'Validate' button has been successfully clicked).

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser window navigating the Odoo interface, rather than terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals match the standard Odoo 17 Time Off / HR module interface, not a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts or database commands to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of python scripts, psql commands, or curl requests being used to insert the accrual plan or allocation directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Odoo 17. Expected Accrual Plan Name: 'Monthly PTO Accrual'. Expected Accrual Rate: 1.67 days. Expected Frequency: monthly. Expected Cap: 20 days. Expected Employee for Allocation: 'Eli Lambert'.
